✦ A letter locked just for you ✦

🎂 When is my birthday?


Hmm, that doesn't seem right. Try again! 💛

Question 3 of 3

🌸 What was our very first conversation about?

Pick one to unlock the letter! 💛

🔓

Your letter is open 💛

Only you could answer those. 🌸

Hey Chechi, I never expected to have this kind of friendship in my life. You are so special to me — both you and Saniga — and I'm truly lucky to have you in my life. I hope our bond continues at least until the end of our academic journey — and even after that, no matter where life takes us, I hope we always remain friends. I will always be here for you. During these average college days, even a small change in behavior used to hurt me because I became overly dependent and had too many expectations. But now I understand how I should behave and handle things better. I never want to lose you both. There's a lot more I want to say, but I don't have the right words to express it. Thank you for being in my life.

With Love 💛
